business_ideas.idea: Premium preventative health scanning service with full body diagnostics
10x better annual physical checkup with labs consults and ongoing support
Annual home environment health audit covering water air EMF lighting
Home maintenance services for water filtration air quality EMF reduction
Functional movement training preventing injuries through core motion patterns
Premium organic produce sourcing direct from local farmers markets
Christmas tree seasonal sales business capturing 30-day holiday spending spike

predictions.text: Health market shifting from fringe early adopters to early majority making services mainstream
Whole Foods will become discount grocer in 15 years as premium local sourcing becomes standard
Blue light LED bulbs cause measurable sleep disruption driving incandescent bulb resurgence
Repeat purchase and retention matters more than initial signups for health subscriptions
EMF exposure standardized on phones from 2000s assuming 20-30 min daily use but reality far exceeds limits
